시편 9:1.content: I will give thanks to Yahweh with my whole heart. I will tell of all your marvelous works.

시편 9:2.content: I will be glad and rejoice in you. I will sing praise to your name, O Most High.

시편 9:3.content: When my enemies turn back, they stumble and perish in your presence.

시편 9:4.content: For you have maintained my just cause. You sit on the throne judging righteously.

시편 9:5.content: You have rebuked the nations. You have destroyed the wicked. You have blotted out their name forever and ever.

시편 9:6.content: The enemy is overtaken by endless ruin. The very memory of the cities which you have overthrown has perished.

시편 9:7.content: But Yahweh reigns forever. He has prepared his throne for judgment.

시편 9:8.content: He will judge the world in righteousness. He will administer judgment to the peoples in uprightness.

시편 9:9.content: Yahweh will also be a high tower for the oppressed; a high tower in times of trouble.

시편 9:10.content: Those who know your name will put their trust in you, for you, Yahweh, have not forsaken those who seek you.

시편 9:11.content: Sing praises to Yahweh, who dwells in Zion, and declare among the people what he has done.

시편 9:12.content: For he who avenges blood remembers them. He doesn’t forget the cry of the afflicted.

시편 9:13.content: Have mercy on me, Yahweh. See my affliction by those who hate me, and lift me up from the gates of death,

시편 9:14.content: that I may show all of your praise. I will rejoice in your salvation in the gates of the daughter of Zion.

시편 9:15.content: The nations have sunk down in the pit that they made. In the net which they hid, their own foot is taken.

시편 9:16.content: Yahweh has made himself known. He has executed judgment. The wicked is snared by the work of his own hands.

시편 9:17.content: The wicked shall be turned back to Sheol, even all the nations that forget God.

시편 9:18.content: For the needy shall not always be forgotten, nor the hope of the poor perish forever.

시편 9:19.content: Arise, Yahweh! Don’t let man prevail. Let the nations be judged in your sight.

시편 9:20.content: Put them in fear, Yahweh. Let the nations know that they are only men.
